scripts.bootstrap: pnpm --filter @v2-ds-example/lib lib && pnpm --filter @v2-ds-example/lib css:gen && pnpm --filter @v2-ds-example/app prepare
scripts.dev: pnpm bootstrap && concurrently --names lib,app --prefix-colors blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @v2-ds-example/lib lib --watch" "pnpm --filter @v2-ds-example/app dev"
